name: Escape: Zombie Maze
short_description: Number19 is sent into a zombie-filled labyrinth through portals by Dimension Technology Lab. In this terrifying world filled with limited ammunition and mysterious enemies, it takes courage and strategy to survive and escape the labyrinth.
detailed_description:
Number19's terrifying adventure continues in a dark and eerie labyrinth. Finding himself in an unknown place, the test subject must face limited ammunition and increasing danger. In this labyrinth dominated by zombies, every corner and every step can be deadly.

Game Features


Limited Resources: With limited ammunition, each shot must be carefully planned. Zombies die from severe head injuries; some require one shot, others two or three to fall.
Varied Challenges: As you progress, the complexity and difficulty of the labyrinth increase. Each level is designed to test the player's intelligence and reflexes.
Realistic Atmosphere: Dark, gloomy environments and tension-filled music keep the player constantly alert. Danger lurks around every corner.
Secrets to Discover: Unveil the hidden secrets in the depths of the labyrinth. Hidden passages, mysterious notes, and surprises are part of this world, and survival requires exploration.
Engaging Story: Learn more about Number19's story, his past, and how he got here. The story unfolds layer by layer, captivating the player.

Deepening Mystery: Dimension Technology Lab


Dimension Technology Lab opens portals and sends people into labyrinths. Sometimes, they send them to unknown places. Is this company a cult? A secret organization? Or a scientific laboratory founded by extraterrestrial beings? Why did they choose Number19? Who is Dimension Technology Lab so afraid of? Why are they afraid? What is the real name of the character Number19? As you search for answers to these questions, you will discover hidden truths in the depths of the game. Are you ready to explore these mysteries and uncover dark secrets?

Escape Zombie Maze brings new life to the survival horror genre. In this epic escape story set in a zombie-filled labyrinth, strategy, skill, and courage will be your greatest weapons. Are you ready? Count your ammunition, hold your breath, and never forget what may be waiting around every corner.

supported_languages: English, Turkish, German, Swedish, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Bulgarian, Danish, Indonesian, Dutch, Finnish, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Polish, Hungarian, Norwegian, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Thai, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Greek, Czech, Croatian, Slovak, Serbian, Hebrew, Icelandic
